productDisplayName: Wrangler Women Lace Detail Purple Top
description: CompositionPurple and black striped top made of 100% cotton, has a deep rounded v- neck, six buttoned placket at centre front with embellished panel, three quarter length raglan sleeves with buttoned mid arm tabs, curved yoked with lacing on back and front and gathers at back and branding on the curved hemFitLooseWash careMachine wash inside out with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach or wringTumble dry or flat dry in shadeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationswrangler has been clothing the world since 1947 and they're showing no sign of slowing down – this pretty top with its Western styling is kept feminine with lacing embellishments, while the cotton fabric keeps you fresh and comfortable all day. Team this with jeans and leather shoes for a cowgirl look.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
